name: Wild Goose
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the cleaned goose in salted water overnight.
2. Rinse and dry the goose, then stuff it with quartered onions and apples.
3. Place breast side up in an open roaster pan and cover with bacon strips.
4. Brown the goose in a 475°F (245°C) oven until the bacon is crisp. Remove and discard the bacon fat and meat.
5. Add chopped onion, carrot, celery, bay leaf, parsley sprigs, thyme, consomme, water, and red wine to the pan. Cover and roast at 375°F (190°C) for 2 to 2-1/2 hours, basting often.
6. The goose is done when the meat pulls away from the bone easily.
7. Remove the goose to a warm platter and discard the stuffing. Strain the gravy and thicken with cornstarch mixed in cold water. Adjust seasoning if needed.
8. Serve with wild rice.
Mrs. Nicholas J. Constantine
